name: Emily Lawson
summary: Results-driven marketing manager with 5 years of experience in B2B SaaS, specializing in demand generation, content strategy, and marketing automation.

experience.title: Senior Marketing Manager
bullets: Led demand generation strategy that increased MQLs by 65%
Managed $1.2M annual marketing budget across paid and organic channels
Built and mentored a team of 4 marketing specialists

experience.title: Marketing Coordinator
bullets: Executed multi-channel campaigns driving 40% increase in website traffic
Managed HubSpot CRM and marketing automation workflows
Coordinated quarterly webinar series with 500+ average attendees
